treatment_information.treatment_response: Improvement in clinical status with antibiotics, specifically developed left-sided crackles during treatment that resolved by discharge.
Part of treatment for possible pneumonia.
Given for fever in the ED.
Started for pneumonia; no adverse reactions noted.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with fever and chills after dental procedure.
Blood cultures and tests performed, leading to referral to the ED.
Received 1g IV vancomycin and gentamicin in the ED.
Started on azithromycin for possible CAP.
Given 1g Tylenol for fever in the ED.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up radiographs recommended within eight weeks.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Expected full recovery based on resolution of pneumonia.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient reported improvement; active and clear mental status upon discharge.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Feels sicker than previous episodes but improved with treatment.
